top_signals.title: Ford Stock Set for Best Month Since Financial Crisis on AI Rally
top_signals.summary: Ford Motor Co. shares are set to record their best monthly gain in 17 years as the automaker’s newfound status as a possible beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom sparked an investor frenzy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hungary President Signals He Won’t Resign in Challenge to Magyar
top_signals.summary: Hungarian President Tamas Sulyok signaled he has no intention of stepping down, setting the stage for a confrontation between the country’s new government and institutions still controlled by appointees of former leader Viktor Orban.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Dan Ives: Anthropic’s growth is 'just the tip of the spear' for AI rally
top_signals.summary: Ives' comments come as part of a wider prediction for the Nasdaq to top 30,000 points by 2027, reiterating his call from earlier interviews with CNBC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan passes bill to raise co-payments for prescription drugs similar to OTC counterparts
top_signals.summary: The health ministry plans to require individuals to bear additional costs for some 1,100 over-the-counter-like prescription drugs starting in March 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: NYSE parent ICE pushes ‘level playing field’ for 24/7 onchain perps
top_signals.summary: ICE’s CEO said regulators need to create a “level playing field” for launching 24/7 onchain perps contracts, which are already trading on exchanges such as Hyperliquid.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
top_signals.summary: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

top_signals.title: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets
top_signals.summary: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets as multibillion-dollar sector draws institutional liquidity providers.
